event_properties.[Amplitude] Element Text: Every year Tableau have a set of competition to find their three Iron Viz competitors for the  Tableau Conference. The start of this years set has just been announced and has the theme of 'found data' from Wikipedia.I have decided to enter and you can find my entry below, click on it to enter the interactive version.InspirationNo idea is new and this is definitely true in data visualisation, we absorb and learn as we find new and interesting content in our field and so it would be fair to say the idea for this visualisation was seeded from several others I've seen over time. HeFifa World Rankings - I saw this Viz last year and immediately fell in love with it, I remembered it after I started my own Viz so guess it had always been at the back of my mind.Tracing the History of NCAA Conferences - This fantastic viz was featured in one of the talks featured at #tapestry and it set the seed for this latest Viz. You can probably see how.State of America Rankings - My research in Sankey last week for the blog too
